projects.projectName: Central-West Orana Renewable Energy Zone (CWO REZ) Transmission Infrastructure
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate - tender active for HV transmission lines and substation construction/equipment supply, target HV transformers, circuit breakers, switchgear FAT and QAQC.
projects.summary: Development of 330kV and 500kV transmission lines and associated substations, including new HV transformers, circuit breakers, and GIS, to connect renewable energy projects within the Central-West Orana REZ to the grid. Procurement for various packages is ongoing, with significant HV equipment procurement expected.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate - major construction is underway, but specialist sub-packages for HV equipment FAT, QAQC surveillance during manufacturing, and commissioning inspection for transformers, circuit breakers and GIS will be ongoing through 2025-2026.
projects.summary: New 500kV transmission line and associated substation upgrades to connect renewable energy generation and enhance grid capacity. Project involves significant HV components including large power transformers, high voltage circuit breakers, and GIS equipment.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate - tenders active for major HVDC converter station equipment and cabling. Target specialist sub-packages for HV equipment FAT and QAQC surveillance for transformers, GIS, and switchgear for converter stations.
projects.summary: Proposed ~1500MW HVDC interconnector between Tasmania and Victoria, including undersea cables and two HVDC converter stations. Converter stations will require substantial HV equipment, including large transformers, switchgear, and potentially GIS.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate - construction is advanced, but commissioning inspection and final HV equipment FAT/QAQC for substation connections, transformers, and switchgear will be critical in 2024-2025 as the battery components are integrated into the grid.
projects.summary: A 700MW/1400MWh BESS project designed to support NSW grid stability. Involves significant HV connection infrastructure, including new substation components, HV transformers and switchgear for connection to the existing 330kV transmission network.

projects.projectName: New England Renewable Energy Zone (REZ) Transmission Infrastructure
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H2 2024 / H1 2025 - detailed planning and initial procurement for transmission line and substation components are expected to commence. Early engagement for technical due diligence and pre-tender QAQC advice for HV equipment.
projects.summary: Development of high voltage transmission lines and new substations to connect future renewable energy projects in the New England REZ. This will involve significant HV transformers, circuit breakers, and other substation equipment.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate - significant portions of the project are under construction. Specialist QAQC surveillance, FAT for remaining HV equipment deliveries (transformers, switchgear), and commissioning inspection will be critical through 2025-2026.
projects.summary: New 330kV and 500kV interconnector between South Australia and New South Wales, with associated substation works and potential 275kV connections in Queensland. Involves substantial HV transformers, circuit breakers, and other substation components for robust grid integration.

projects.projectName: Dinawan Renewable Energy Zone (REZ) Transmission Infrastructure
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H2 2024 / H1 2025 - initial planning and environmental approvals are underway. Procurement for early works and detailed design, followed by major HV equipment, is expected to start within 12-18 months. Target technical due diligence and early QAQC advice.
projects.summary: New transmission infrastructure to unlock renewable energy potential in Central Queensland. Will involve new high voltage transmission lines, multiple substations requiring HV transformers, circuit breakers, and other primary equipment.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H2 2024 / H1 2025 - while major construction is ongoing, specialist sub-packages for commissioning inspection and final FAT/QAQC of remaining HV components (transformers, switchgear in collector substations) will be active as sections of the wind farm prepare for energisation.
projects.summary: One of Australia's largest wind farms. Includes a 64km transmission line and multiple substations to connect to the grid. Project involves extensive HV equipment for power collection and transmission, including collector transformers, switchgear, and grid connection components.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate and ongoing - hyperscale data centre expansions continuously require new dedicated substations, grid connections, and associated HV infrastructure. Procurement for transformers, switchgear, and grid connection services is recurrent.
projects.summary: Continuous expansion of hyperscale data centre capacity across major Australian cities. These projects require substantial, dedicated HV power infrastructure, including new large-scale substations, HV transformers, switchgear, and new or upgraded transmission connections to ensure high reliability and capacity.

projects.projectName: Walcha Energy Project (Winterbourne Wind, Salisbury Solar, Dungowan Pumped Hydro)
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H1 2025 - complex, multi-asset project with procurement for HV equipment (transformers, circuit breakers for grid connection) anticipated to open in late 2025 / early 2026 following final investment decisions.
projects.summary: A large-scale integrated renewable energy hub comprising significant wind, solar, and potentially hydrogen and pumped hydro components, requiring substantial new HV transmission infrastructure and substations for grid connection. This will involve numerous HV transformers and associated switchgear.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H1 2025 - expansion plans are in advanced stages. Procurement for new generation assets and associated grid connections, including HV transformers and switchgear for new substations, is expected to ramp up in 2025.
projects.summary: Expansion of an existing renewable energy park with additional wind, solar, and battery storage capacity. The expansion will require new grid connection infrastructure and upgrades to existing substations, involving new HV transformers and switchgear.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H1 2026 - this project is in the long-term planning phase. Early engagement for technical due diligence for network design and future QAQC strategies for HV equipment procurement (transformers, circuit breakers, GIS) is recommended.
projects.summary: Potential future extensions of the EnergyConnect project towards the Queensland border, aiming to further strengthen interstate transmission capacity. This would necessitate new HV transmission lines and substantial substation development with associated HV equipment.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H2 2024 - as construction nears completion, focus on commissioning inspection and final FAT/QAQC for substation components, transformers and switchgear during energisation phases.
projects.summary: Wind farm with a 132kV/275kV substation and transmission line connection to the grid. Involves new HV transformers, circuit breakers, and substation infrastructure for grid integration. Specialist inspection of these components during commissioning is relevant.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H2 2024 - as solar and battery components are integrated, commissioning inspection and final FAT/QAQC for collector substation transformers, switchgear, and grid connection equipment will be active.
projects.summary: Large-scale solar farm with integrated BESS, requiring substantial new collector substations and grid connection infrastructure. Key HV components include power transformers and switchgear for 132kV and 275kV connections.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H1 2025 - procurement for turbines, BESS, and significant new HV grid connections for Stages 2 & 3 is expected to commence. Target technical due diligence, QAQC for HV transformers and switchgear.
projects.summary: Future stages of the Goyder South project, expanding wind and battery storage capacity significantly. Will require new or expanded substation infrastructure and HV transmission connections, involving large transformers and switchgear.

projects.projectName: NextDC S4 & S5 Data Centre Expansions
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H1 2025 - these are large-scale hyperscale expansions, which will require new dedicated substations or significant upgrades to existing ones, involving procurement of HV transformers and switchgear. Target technical due diligence and pre-tender QAQC.
projects.summary: Future hyperscale data centre facilities requiring new, high-capacity grid connections and dedicated substations. The power infrastructure will involve substantial HV equipment, including transformers and switchgear, to handle multi-MW loads.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H1 2026 - these projects are in feasibility/early development. Focus on providing technical due diligence for power infrastructure, future grid connection requirements, and pre-FEED QAQC advice for HV equipment.
projects.summary: A cluster of proposed green hydrogen production facilities. Successful projects will require significant new electricity supply and potentially dedicated HV grid connections or upgrades to support large-scale electrolysis, involving HV transformers and switchgear.

projects.projectName: South West Renewable Energy Zone (REZ) Transmission Infrastructure
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H2 2025 - initial planning and consultation are ongoing. Procurement for the transmission and substation components, including HV transformers and circuit breakers, is expected to follow the CWO and New England REZs.
projects.summary: Development of high voltage transmission lines and new substations to integrate future renewable energy projects in the South West REZ. This will involve substantial HV equipment, including transformers, circuit breakers, and GIS.

projects.projectName: Port of Newcastle Green Hydrogen Hub
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H1 2026 - early-stage feasibility and design. Focus on technical due diligence for power supply requirements, potential new grid connections, and pre-FEED QAQC planning for HV equipment.
projects.summary: Development of a green hydrogen production and export hub. Will require significant dedicated power supply infrastructure and potential new HV grid connections, involving HV transformers and switchgear for electrolysis facilities.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H1 2025 - detailed planning and approvals are progressing, with major procurement for HV transmission lines and substation components (transformers, circuit breakers, GIS) expected to commence in 2025-2026.
projects.summary: A proposed new high-capacity transmission interconnector between Victoria and New South Wales. This project will require extensive HV transmission lines and multiple new or upgraded substations with associated HV transformers, circuit breakers, and GIS equipment.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate - this auction is for major new HV transmission lines and substations. Successful bidders will immediately commence procurement. Target new HV transformers, circuit breakers, switchgear, and GIS FAT and QAQC.
projects.summary: Auction of 15 lots comprising 8,500 km of new transmission lines and 20.8 GW of transformation capacity across multiple Brazilian states. This represents a massive opportunity for HV equipment procurement, including transformers, circuit breakers, and substation construction.

projects.projectName: A-5 and A-6 Energy Auction Projects (2023 winners)
projects.location: Various states (e.g., Bahia, Piauí, Minas Gerais)
projects.owner: Various (e.g., EDF Renewables, Voltalia, Atlas Renewable Energy)
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H1 2025 - projects awarded in 2023 for delivery in 2028-2029 are now entering the detailed design, financing, and procurement phases. Target HV equipment for new substations and grid connections, including FAT and QAQC.
projects.summary: Projects awarded in recent long-term energy auctions, primarily large-scale solar PV and wind farms. These projects will require new grid connection infrastructure, including substations with HV transformers, circuit breakers, and switchgear for connection to the national grid.

projects.location: São Paulo, Rio de Janeiro, Fortaleza and other regions
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate and ongoing - Ascenty is a leading hyperscale data centre operator in Brazil with continuous expansion. Each new data centre or expansion requires dedicated substations, new grid connections, and associated HV infrastructure. Procurement for transformers, switchgear, and grid connection services is recurrent.
projects.summary: Continuous development and expansion of hyperscale and colocation data centres across Brazil. These projects demand substantial, dedicated HV power infrastructure, including new large-scale substations, HV transformers, circuit breakers, and new or upgraded transmission connections to ensure high reliability and capacity.

projects.location: São Paulo, Rio de Janeiro, Porto Alegre, Chile, Colombia
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate and ongoing - Scala is rapidly expanding its hyperscale data centre footprint in Latin America, with Brazil as a key market. New campuses and expansions continuously require dedicated high-capacity substations and grid connections. Focus on FAT/QAQC for HV transformers and switchgear.
projects.summary: Rapid development of new hyperscale data centre campuses by Scala Data Centers. Each new facility involves substantial investment in power infrastructure, including dedicated high-voltage substations, HV transformers, switchgear, and often new transmission line connections to ensure reliable, high-capacity power supply.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H1 2025 - expansion project planning is underway. Procurement for new wind turbines and associated grid connection infrastructure, including HV transformers and switchgear for collection and transmission, is expected within 6-12 months.
projects.summary: Expansion of an existing wind farm complex, requiring new wind turbines and upgrades/expansions to the existing substation and transmission lines. This will involve the procurement of new HV transformers and switchgear for power collection and grid connection.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H1 2025 - this expansion is in advanced planning. Procurement for solar panels, inverters, and crucially, for new HV substation equipment (transformers, circuit breakers) for grid connection, is expected to start in 2025.
projects.summary: Expansion of a large solar complex in Piauí. The project will require new collector substations and grid connection infrastructure, involving new HV transformers, circuit breakers, and switchgear to integrate additional solar capacity into the national grid.
